hypothesis: Implementing a two-stage computer-vision pipeline that first detects and localizes molecular structure images in scientific PDFs with ≥90% mAP and then segments and standardizes these images prior to applying DECIMER will increase SMILES extraction recall on ChemX small-molecule datasets from under 5% to over 50%, thereby improving overall small-molecule extraction F1 by at least 30 percentage points compared to the current single-agent approaches.
